NAME: Divay Aggarwal
SUMMARY: Results-driven \textbf{Systems Software Engineer} with strong fundamentals in \textbf{Operating Systems}, \textbf{Data Structures}, and \textbf{Systems Programming}. Expertise in building \textbf{Linux-based foundations} and infrastructure software using \textbf{Python} and \textbf{C++}, tailored for platform environments. Proven experience in architecting scalable, high-performance \textbf{Linux systems} and automating system-level tasks. Eager to contribute to large-scale infrastructure operations, focusing on robust \textbf{system-level behavior} and efficient resource management.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Spearheaded the \textbf{platform architecture} of \textbf{"Redbooks"}, a mission-critical financial ledger system facilitating automated accounting and auditing for over \textbf{\$5M+ in monthly transactions}.

Engineered robust \textbf{Python modules} encapsulating core \textbf{system logic}, automating \textbf{AR/AP Invoices, Journal Entries, and Credit Memos} generation with strict \textbf{ACID compliance}.
Designed resilient \textbf{ETL pipelines} using \textbf{Python automation} for synchronizing \textbf{50,000+ daily records} from mid-office servers to Redbooks, ensuring 99.9\% data consistency.
Optimized \textbf{PostgreSQL} performance via compound indexing and query refactoring, reducing average query execution time by \textbf{35\%} during peak loads.
Championed \textbf{Test-Driven Development (TDD)} by implementing comprehensive \textbf{pytest} test suites, achieving \textbf{90\% code coverage} and significantly reducing production bugs.

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
bullets: Architected a \textbf{system-level Budget Management} tool for \textbf{Linux platforms}, devising a custom \textbf{Weighted Moving Average (WMA)} formula to predict billing with \textbf{92\% accuracy}.
Engineered granular \textbf{Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)}, defining distinct dashboard views and permissions for \textbf{Super Admins, CEOs, and Managers} to oversee budget allotments.
Implemented \textbf{robust Audit Logs} for compliance and integrated \textbf{automated email alerts} via \textbf{Python} to notify stakeholders of budget overruns, cutting excess spend by 15\%.
Designed interactive \textbf{performance visualizations} for real-time spending trends, optimizing \textbf{data structure} aggregations to handle complex reporting data efficiently.

projects.title: Custom Linux Kernel Module for Storage Analysis

bullets: Developed a \textbf{custom Linux kernel module} using \textbf{C++} for real-time storage analytics, leveraging \textbf{kernel interfaces} to monitor \textbf{ext4 filesystem} behavior in virtualized setups.
Implemented an \textbf{automated system diagnostics} tool using \textbf{Python} and \textbf{Bash}, offloading intensive analysis tasks to reduce system troubleshooting times by \textbf{40\%}.

projects.title: Infrastructure Performance Monitoring System

Optimized \textbf{filesystem} performance using \textbf{caching strategies} and enforced data integrity via \textbf{C++ algorithms} for system reliability.
